basic_details.job_title: IIT Madras Project Scientist - I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) Project Scientist - I Notification 2026 has been released on 13 July 2026 on the official website of IIT Madras. A total of 4 Project Scientist - I vacancies have been announced through the IIT Madras Project Scientist - I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech in Bioprocess Engineering or a related field with minimum 3 years' experience or fresh Ph.D in Biotechnology
qualification.details: M.Tech in Bioprocess Engineering or a related field with minimum 3 years' experience or fresh Ph.D in Biotechnology. Expertise in molecular biology and recombinant DNA techniques. Experience in microbial fermentation/cell culture including shake flask and bioreactor operations. Experience in downstream processing and analytical characterization techniques. Ability to work and collaborate in cross-functional teams in a fast-paced and dynamic team setting. Ability to think critically, demonstrate troubleshooting and problem-solving skills. Documentation including report writing and data analysis skills. Excellent communication skills both written and oral. Good publication record desirable.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Project Scientist - I Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Project Scientist - I Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
IIT Madras Project Scientist - I Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M.Tech in Bioprocess Engineering or a related field with minimum 3 years' experience or fresh Ph.D in Biotechnology. Expertise in molecular biology and recombinant DNA techniques. Experience in microbial fermentation/cell culture including shake flask and bioreactor operations. Experience in downstream processing and analytical characterization techniques. Ability to work and collaborate in cross-functional teams in a fast-paced and dynamic team setting. Ability to think critically, demonstrate troubleshooting and problem-solving skills. Documentation including report writing and data analysis skills. Excellent communication skills both written and oral. Good publication record desirable.

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Project Scientist - I Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Project Scientist - I Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Project Scientist - I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Madras Project Scientist – I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Project Scientist – I posts at IIT Madras is 27th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Scientist – I position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Project Scientist – I position announced by IIT Madras.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates should have an M.Tech in Bioprocess Engineering or a related field with at least 3 years of experience, or be a fresh Ph.D. holder in Biotechnology.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Scientist – I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 85,833/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for IIT Madras Project Scientist – I posts?
faq.answer: The application for these posts must be submitted online through the official IIT Madras website.

faq.question: Q7. What are the key skills required for the Project Scientist – I position?
faq.answer: Key skills include expertise in molecular biology, recombinant DNA techniques, fermentation, cell culture, downstream processing, analytical characterization, and strong communication and problem-solving abilities.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Project Scientist – I recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting of applications, followed by a test or interview, and document verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article, where a direct link to the PDF is provided.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job is contractual in nature, as indicated in the recruitment details for the Project Scientist – I posts at IIT Madras.
